scenes.title: The cells
scenes.biggestGap: One interior beat slips from audible confinement into free-camera reconstruction.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: adjacent dungeon cells directly below the tribunal wing and evidence vault
sceneContract.materialAnchor: cold flagstones, mortar seams, chain, grate light, blanket wool
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads acoustics, gait, and threat through stone instead of speculation
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: breath, chain rasp, palm to wall, torch hiss
sceneContract.exitAnchor: vault pressure felt through the foundations

scenes.title: The trial
scenes.biggestGap: Several lines summarize institutional meaning instead of staying with room facts, paper, benches, and bodies.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: tribunal hall under the same palace roof and near the sealed evidence vault
sceneContract.materialAnchor: bench wood, chains, desk papers, lead chest, ward paste, clerk pots
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas tracks consequence through Thornton, the gallery, and the benches
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: page turns, glove leather, chair arms, witness rail, pen scratch
sceneContract.exitAnchor: the guilty word translating instantly into chain and escorted descent

scenes.title: The betrayals
scenes.biggestGap: Pressure mostly holds, but every institutional failure must stay embodied in bodies, documents, and seats rather than summary.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: same tribunal chamber with the gallery and witness chair still active
sceneContract.materialAnchor: sealed document, witness rail, ledgers, bench wood, visible breath
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads failure through posture, omissions, and who does not step forward
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: empty witness chair, vellum edges, paused pens, gallery stillness
sceneContract.exitAnchor: verdict arriving as procedure, not melodrama

scenes.title: The aftermath
scenes.biggestGap: The chapter close briefly turns conclusions into abstract shapes instead of anchored corroboration and paving-level consequence.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: return to the same cells with the vault and lower court directly above and beyond
sceneContract.materialAnchor: frost on blanket edge, blue torch base, bars, chain, road dust on boots
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas values corroboration, timing, and leverage over hope-language
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: taps through mortar, hand through bars, shackle grip, corridor footsteps
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Lor'themar heading toward the colder dark above while the wall answers back
